title: Smart View
description: A mod that allows you to switch viewpoints by holding down the button.
body:
# Smart View

[![GitHub Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/koto28/smart-view)](https://github.com/KOTO28/smart-view/releases/latest) ![GitHub Downloads (all assets, all releases)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/koto28/smart-view/total?logo=github) English | [日本語](https://github.com/KOTO28/smart-view/blob/main/README_ja.md) A Minecraft mod that allows you to switch viewpoints by holding down the button. ## Usage This mod provides the ability to switch viewpoints by holding down the button. By default, no key binding is set, so you must first set the key. ### Controls settings 1. Open `Options > Controls` from the Minecraft menu. 2. Find the **Smart View** category 3. Set the following keys: - **ThirdPersonView Back** - Switches to a view looking at the player from the back. - **ThirdPersonView Front** - Switches to a view looking at the player from the front. ### Controls - **Hold key**: Switches to the set view. - **Release key**: Returns to first-person view (standard view).
